Lead-to-advocate allocation engine for staff, juniors, seniors and firms.

LEAD EXCHANGE
Exchange Home Marketplace Geo Matching Assignment

Assignment Engine

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Exchange > Assignment

Junior First Escalation Ready Firm Routing

Assignment Logic

  • Small public query → junior advocate or consultation desk
  • Notice/reply drafting → available specialist or drafting desk
  • Corporate or high-risk matter → senior advocate / firm routing
  • Document-only need → notary or documentation desk
  • Missed contact → callback queue or reassignment layer

Manual Assignment
